variables.input: smartscapeNodes "AWS_*" | summarize by: {aws.account.id} | fields aws.account.id | sort aws.account.id asc
smartscapeNodes "AWS_*" | summarize by: {aws.region} | fields aws.region | sort aws.region asc

0.content:
# ☁️ Cloud FinOps Management
Visibilidade de custos, otimização de recursos e governança multi-cloud

2.title: Total de Recursos AWS
2.query:
smartscapeNodes "AWS_*"
| filter in(aws.account.id, array($AccountFilter))
| filter in(aws.region, array($RegionFilter))
| summarize total = count()

3.title: Instâncias EC2
3.query:
smartscapeNodes "AWS_EC2_INSTANCE"
| filter in(aws.account.id, array($AccountFilter))
| filter in(aws.region, array($RegionFilter))
| parse aws.object, "JSON:awsjson"
| fieldsAdd state = awsjson[configuration][state][name]
| filter state == "running"
| summarize total = count()

4.title: Volumes EBS Não Anexados
4.query:
smartscapeNodes "AWS_EC2_VOLUME"
| filter in(aws.account.id, array($AccountFilter))
| filter in(aws.region, array($RegionFilter))
| parse aws.object, "JSON:awsjson"
| fieldsAdd state = awsjson[configuration][state]
| filter state == "available"
| summarize total = count()

5.title: IPs Elásticos Não Associados
5.query:
smartscapeNodes "AWS_EC2_EIP"
| filter in(aws.account.id, array($AccountFilter))
| filter in(aws.region, array($RegionFilter))
| parse aws.object, "JSON:awsjson"
| fieldsAdd associationId = awsjson[configuration][associationId]
| filter isNull(associationId)
| summarize total = count()

6.title: Funções Lambda
6.query:
smartscapeNodes "AWS_LAMBDA_FUNCTION"
| filter in(aws.account.id, array($AccountFilter))
| filter in(aws.region, array($RegionFilter))
| summarize total = count()

8.title: Recursos por Tipo de Serviço
8.query:
smartscapeNodes "AWS_*"
| filter in(aws.account.id, array($AccountFilter))
| filter in(aws.region, array($RegionFilter))
| summarize resource_count = count(), by: {type}
| sort resource_count desc
| limit 15

9.title: Recursos por Conta e Região
9.query:
smartscapeNodes "AWS_*"
| filter in(aws.account.id, array($AccountFilter))
| filter in(aws.region, array($RegionFilter))
| summarize resource_count = count(), by: {aws.account.id, aws.region}
| sort resource_count desc

11.title: Distribuição de Tipos de Instância EC2
11.query:
smartscapeNodes "AWS_EC2_INSTANCE"
| filter in(aws.account.id, array($AccountFilter))
| filter in(aws.region, array($RegionFilter))
| parse aws.object, "JSON:awsjson"
| fieldsAdd instanceType = awsjson[configuration][instanceType],
            state = awsjson[configuration][state][name]
| filter state == "running"
| summarize instance_count = count(), by: {instanceType}
| sort instance_count desc

12.title: Classes de Instância RDS
12.query:
smartscapeNodes "AWS_RDS_DBINSTANCE"
| filter in(aws.account.id, array($AccountFilter))
| filter in(aws.region, array($RegionFilter))
| parse aws.object, "JSON:awsjson"
| fieldsAdd instanceClass = awsjson[configuration][dbInstanceClass]
| summarize db_count = count(), by: {instanceClass, aws.region}
| sort db_count desc

15.title: Volumes EBS por Tipo e Estado
15.query:
smartscapeNodes "AWS_EC2_VOLUME"
| filter in(aws.account.id, array($AccountFilter))
| filter in(aws.region, array($RegionFilter))
| parse aws.object, "JSON:awsjson"
| fieldsAdd volumeType = awsjson[configuration][volumeType],
            size = awsjson[configuration][size],
            state = awsjson[configuration][state]
| summarize total_volumes = count(), total_size_gb = sum(size), by: {volumeType, state}
| sort total_size_gb desc

16.title: Snapshots RDS por Tipo
16.query:
smartscapeNodes "AWS_RDS_DBCLUSTERSNAPSHOT"
| filter in(aws.account.id, array($AccountFilter))
| filter in(aws.region, array($RegionFilter))
| parse aws.object, "JSON:awsjson"
| fieldsAdd snapshotType = awsjson[configuration][snapshotType]
| summarize snapshot_count = count(), by: {snapshotType, aws.region}
| sort snapshot_count desc

18.title: Distribuição de Runtimes Lambda
18.query:
smartscapeNodes "AWS_LAMBDA_FUNCTION"
| filter in(aws.account.id, array($AccountFilter))
| filter in(aws.region, array($RegionFilter))
| parse aws.object, "JSON:awsjson"
| fieldsAdd runtime = awsjson[configuration][runtime]
| summarize function_count = count(), by: {runtime}
| sort function_count desc

19.title: Alocação de Memória Lambda
19.query:
smartscapeNodes "AWS_LAMBDA_FUNCTION"
| filter in(aws.account.id, array($AccountFilter))
| filter in(aws.region, array($RegionFilter))
| parse aws.object, "JSON:awsjson"
| fieldsAdd memory = awsjson[configuration][memorySize]
| summarize function_count = count(), by: {memory}
| sort memory desc

20.title: NAT Gateways por VPC
20.query:
smartscapeNodes "AWS_EC2_NATGATEWAY"
| filter in(aws.account.id, array($AccountFilter))
| filter in(aws.region, array($RegionFilter))
| parse aws.object, "JSON:awsjson"
| fieldsAdd state = awsjson[configuration][state]
| filter state == "available"
| summarize nat_count = count(), by: {aws.vpc.id, aws.availability_zone}
| sort nat_count desc

21.title: ElastiCache - Tipos de Nó
21.query:
smartscapeNodes "AWS_ELASTICACHE_REPLICATIONGROUP"
| filter in(aws.account.id, array($AccountFilter))
| filter in(aws.region, array($RegionFilter))
| parse aws.object, "JSON:awsjson"
| fieldsAdd nodeType = awsjson[configuration][cacheNodeType]
| summarize cluster_count = count(), by: {nodeType, aws.region}
| sort cluster_count desc

23.title: Cobertura de Tags por Tipo de Recurso
23.query:
smartscapeNodes "AWS_*"
| filter in(aws.account.id, array($AccountFilter))
| filter in(aws.region, array($RegionFilter))
| fieldsAdd has_env_tag = if(isNotNull(tags[Environment]), 1)
| fieldsAdd has_owner_tag = if(isNotNull(tags[Owner]), 1)
| summarize
    total = count(),
    with_env = sum(has_env_tag),
    with_owner = sum(has_owner_tag),
  by: {type}
| fieldsAdd
    env_coverage_pct = round((with_env * 100.0) / total, decimals: 1),
    owner_coverage_pct = round((with_owner * 100.0) / total, decimals: 1)
| sort env_coverage_pct asc
| limit 20

24.title: Recursos Sem Nenhuma Tag
24.query:
smartscapeNodes "AWS_*"
| filter in(aws.account.id, array($AccountFilter))
| filter in(aws.region, array($RegionFilter))
| filter isNull(tags)
| summarize untagged_count = count(), by: {type}
| sort untagged_count desc
| limit 15

26.title: Volumes EBS Não Anexados (Detalhes)
26.query:
smartscapeNodes "AWS_EC2_VOLUME"
| filter in(aws.account.id, array($AccountFilter))
| filter in(aws.region, array($RegionFilter))
| parse aws.object, "JSON:awsjson"
| fieldsAdd state = awsjson[configuration][state],
            volumeType = awsjson[configuration][volumeType],
            size = awsjson[configuration][size]
| filter state == "available"
| fields name, aws.resource.id, volumeType, size, aws.region, aws.account.id
| sort size desc

27.title: IPs Elásticos Não Associados (Detalhes)
27.query:
smartscapeNodes "AWS_EC2_EIP"
| filter in(aws.account.id, array($AccountFilter))
| filter in(aws.region, array($RegionFilter))
| parse aws.object, "JSON:awsjson"
| fieldsAdd associationId = awsjson[configuration][associationId]
| filter isNull(associationId)
| fields name, aws.resource.id, aws.region, aws.account.id

28.title: Recursos Deletados Recentemente
28.query:
smartscapeNodes "AWS_*"
| filter in(aws.account.id, array($AccountFilter))
| filter in(aws.region, array($RegionFilter))
| filter cloud.acquisition.status == "DELETED"
| summarize deleted_count = count(), by: {type}
| sort deleted_count desc
| limit 10

30.title: Auto Scaling - Capacidade e Headroom
30.query:
smartscapeNodes "AWS_AUTOSCALING_AUTOSCALINGGROUP"
| filter in(aws.account.id, array($AccountFilter))
| filter in(aws.region, array($RegionFilter))
| parse aws.object, "JSON:awsjson"
| fieldsAdd minSize = awsjson[configuration][minSize],
            maxSize = awsjson[configuration][maxSize],
            desiredCapacity = awsjson[configuration][desiredCapacity]
| fields name, minSize, maxSize, desiredCapacity, aws.region
| sort desiredCapacity desc

31.title: Disponibilidade de IPs em Subnets
31.query:
smartscapeNodes "AWS_EC2_SUBNET"
| filter in(aws.account.id, array($AccountFilter))
| filter in(aws.region, array($RegionFilter))
| parse aws.object, "JSON:awsjson"
| fieldsAdd availableIpCount = awsjson[configuration][availableIpAddressCount],
            cidrBlock = awsjson[configuration][cidrBlock]
| fields name, cidrBlock, availableIpCount, aws.vpc.id, aws.availability_zone
| sort availableIpCount asc
| limit 20

33.title: Recursos por CostCenter
33.query:
smartscapeNodes "AWS_*"
| filter in(aws.account.id, array($AccountFilter))
| filter in(aws.region, array($RegionFilter))
| filter isNotNull(tags[CostCenter])
| summarize resource_count = count(), by: {tags[CostCenter], type}
| sort resource_count desc
| limit 20

34.title: Multi-Account - Resumo de Recursos
34.query:
smartscapeNodes "AWS_*"
| filter in(aws.account.id, array($AccountFilter))
| filter in(aws.region, array($RegionFilter))
| summarize resource_count = count(), by: {aws.account.id, type}
| sort resource_count desc
| limit 30
